positive: A detailed symmetrical celestial woodland scene featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. The main subject is a stylized, glowing archway or portal framing a lush, enchanted forest vista. Elements include gentle, curving lines, highly detailed leaves, exotic hummingbirds, and glowing mushrooms. The style should be neo-Victorian botanical illustration meets modern kawaii art, utilizing strong silhouette definition and high contrast. Palette focuses on deep indigo blues, emerald greens, soft golds, and ethereal magentas. Composition must be centrally focused, highly scalable for fabric printing, and maintain clean, defined edges against a subtly textured background. Flat graphic design elements are integrated with realistic detail.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, low detail, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, muted colors, grain, bokeh
